---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to Geminoria commands, tool behavior, or configuration.
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you want.

## Problem Statement

What limitation, frustration, or use case does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior you want, including any command syntax, output format, or config changes.

## Example Usage

Provide a concrete example if possible.

```text
@gemini your example query here
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches or workarounds you considered.

## Additional Context

Add anything else that would help evaluate the request.
